s: Track the series you're currently watching
d:
what I watch helps you keep track of the series you're currently watching. Built for privacy and simplicity, the app operates entirely on your device — no accounts, no sign-ups, no data sharing, no social bullshits. Everything stays local. Series and episode data is sourced from the TVmaze public API. ⚠️ THIS APP IS NOT FOR WATCHING TV SHOWS, IT ONLY TRACKS YOUR PROGRESS ⚠️ Features
  • Search series in the TVmaze database
  • Track your preferred series
  • Mark watched episodes
  • All your data is saved locally on your device
  • No permission needed
  • Backup & restore with SQLite files: it's your data do what you want with it
